@@ -118,6 +118,35 @@ jobs:
           npm install --no-save markdownlint-cli
           npx markdownlint --ignore libtenzir/aux --ignore node_modules .
 
+  ocsf-schemas:
+    name: ocsf-schemas
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.12"
+      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+      - name: Check
+        run: |
+          set -eo pipefail
+          base=$(git merge-base origin/main HEAD)
+          if ! git diff --submodule=diff --name-only --no-color --diff-filter=ACDMR "$base" -- \
+            scripts/ocsf-schemas.py \
+            schema/types/ocsf \
+            'libtenzir/include/tenzir/ocsf_*.inc' | grep -q .; then
+            echo "OCSF generator inputs and outputs unchanged, skipping"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+          uv run --script scripts/ocsf-schemas.py
+          git add --intent-to-add --all
+          git diff --submodule=diff --exit-code || {
+            echo '::error title=ocsf-schemas::Please run `uv run --script scripts/ocsf-schemas.py` and commit the generated changes.'
+            git diff --submodule=diff --exit-code
+          }
+
   shellcheck:
     name: shellcheck
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+---
+title: OCSF 1.8.0 support in ocsf::derive
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+pr: 5939
+created: 2026-03-23T16:33:57.938809Z
+---
+
+The `ocsf::derive` operator now supports OCSF `1.8.0` events.
+
+For example, you can now derive enum and sibling fields for events that declare
+`metadata.version: "1.8.0"`:
+
+```tql
+from {metadata: {version: "1.8.0"}, class_uid: 1007}
+ocsf::derive
+```
+
+This keeps OCSF normalization pipelines working when producers emit `1.8.0`
+events.
